data.title: Shareholder Alert: The Ademi Firm investigates whether Soleno Therapeutics Inc.'s Transaction with Neurocrine is Fair to Public Shareholders
data.description: A law firm based in Milwaukee, Ademi LLP, is currently looking into potential breaches of fiduciary duty and other legal violations by Soleno (SLNO) following its recent deal with Neurocrine. This investigation involves a transaction that was announced on April 6, 2026. Individuals interested in joining the investigation or seeking more information can find details by clicking the provided link.

data.title: Celldex Therapeutics Announces Closing of Public Offering of Common Stock and Full Exercise of Underwriters’ Option to Purchase Additional Shares
data.description: Celldex Therapeutics, Inc. disclosed the completion of its recent underwritten public offering of 11,896,750 common stock shares, with the underwriters exercising their option to buy an additional 1,551,750 shares at $29.00 each. The total gross proceeds for Celldex amounted to around $345 million from this offering, not factoring in underwriting discounts, commissions, and other associated expenses. All shares in this offering were sold by Celldex.

data.title: Natural gas supply shocks prompt Asian countries & others to reconsider nuclear energy, post-Fukushima 2011.
data.description: The disruption to natural gas supplies has compelled several countries in Asia and other regions to reconsider their stance on nuclear energy following the Fukushima disaster in 2011.

data.title: AstreaX Launches Digital Wallet to Transform Citizen Access to Government Services
data.description: AstreaX, a prominent company in government technology and digital identity based in TEMPE, Ariz., recently unveiled the AX Wallet—an innovative approach to identity management. The platform offers secure and integrated citizen-centric experiences, catering to modern digital needs. Launched on April 6, 2026, the AX Wallet represents a significant step forward in transforming how individuals manage their identities digitally. This solution provides users with a user-friendly mobile interface, ensuring ease of access. AstreaX aims to revolutionize identity management with this offering, emphasizing security and convenience for users.

data.title: Amgen Posts 77% Response In Thyroid Eye Disease Study
data.description: Amgen Inc.'s shares decreased after releasing top-line results from a Phase 3 trial of TEPEZZA, an on-body injector for those with moderate-to-severe active Thyroid Eye Disease. The Phase 3 TEPEZZA OBI trial met its primary endpoint, with a 77% proptosis response rate during the 24-week placebo-controlled period, showing a mean proptosis reduction of -3.17 mm. The FDA cautioned about serious liver injuries associated with Amgen's Tavneos (avacopan), approved in October 2021, citing postmarketing data indicating new safety concerns.

data.title: Canadian General Investments: Investment Update - Unaudited
data.description: In Canada, Canadian General Investments, Limited (CGI) disclosed on an unaudited basis that their net asset value per share (NAV) by March 31, 2026 stood at $81.26. This resulted in year-to-date and 12-month NAV returns, with dividends reinvested, of 1.1% and 29.6%, correspondingly. These figures were in contrast to the benchmark S&P/TSX Composite Index, which registered returns of 3.9% and 34.8% on a total return basis for the same periods. The company's shares are listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: CGI) and the London Stock Exchange (LSE: CGI).

data.title: IMF cautions that Tokenized Finance and Stablecoins could worsen financial crises with rapid settlement outpacing regulation.
data.description: According to the International Monetary Fund, tokenization is now facilitating settlements at rapid machine speeds, surpassing the capabilities of current regulatory tools.
